ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., reinforcement learning, robotics simulation) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the experiment is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the agent belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the agent */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the agent (e.g., Q-learning, SARSA) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the agent (e.g., learning rate, epsilon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that took the action */,
  "action_space" TEXT /* Action space of the agent (e.g., continuous, discrete) */,
  "action_values" TEXT /* Values of the action (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action that received the reward */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent that made the observation */,
  "observation_space" TEXT /* Observation space of the agent (e.g., continuous, discrete) */,
  "observation_values" TEXT /* Values of the observation (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the timestep belongs to */,
  "timestep_number" INTEGER /* Number of the timestep */,
  "timestep_data" TEXT /* Data collected at the timestep (e.g., actions, rewards, observations) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the timestep occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_distributions" (
  "action_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action distribution */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action the distribution belongs to */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  "distribution_values" TEXT /* Values of the distribution (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_distributions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logstd_action_distributions" (
  "logstd_action_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log standard deviation */,
  "action_distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action distribution the log standard deviation belongs to */,
  "logstd_values" TEXT /* Values of the log standard deviation (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logstd_action_distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logstd_action_distributions_action_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_distribution_id") REFERENCES action_distributions ("action_distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "avg_action_distributions" (
  "avg_action_distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average action distribution */,
  "action_distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action distribution the average action distribution belongs to */,
  "avg_values" TEXT /* Values of the average action distribution (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_action_distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_avg_action_distributions_action_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_distribution_id") REFERENCES action_distributions ("action_distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_observations" (
  "human_observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the human observation belongs to */,
  "human_observation_values" TEXT /* Values of the human observation (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("human_observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_observations_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_rewards" (
  "original_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each original reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward the original reward belongs to */,
  "original_reward_values" TEXT /* Values of the original reward (e.g., [1.23, 2.34, 3.45]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("original_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_original_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
